title: Legacy4J panoramas
description: What if Legacy Console had Java panoramas?
body:
# THESE MODS ARE NOW UNSUPPORTED, I WILL NOT BE UPDATING THEM ANYMORE

## What if
What if the Legacy Console editions didn't get cancelled? What if they kept getting updates?

The [Legacy 4J mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j), paired with these panoramas, brings an overall feel of what could of been.

## Function of the pack
These resource packs add the Java Edition panoramas to [Legacy 4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) (other than the custom Nether Update one I made), from 1.12 up to 1.21.

![1.16 panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2c144fd189c51ac287866633a7ebc32e0106e3d.png)
